events.text: Goal!  Nigeria 0, Argentina 1. Lionel Messi (Argentina) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the high centre of the goal.
Goal!  Nigeria 1, Argentina 1. Ahmed Musa (Nigeria) right footed shot from the left side of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Michael Babatunde.
Goal!  Nigeria 1, Argentina 2. Lionel Messi (Argentina) from a free kick with a left footed shot to the top right corner.
Goal!  Nigeria 2, Argentina 2. Ahmed Musa (Nigeria) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Emmanuel Emenike.
Kenneth Omeruo (Nigeria) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  Nigeria 2, Argentina 3. Marcos Rojo (Argentina) right footed shot from very close range to the top right corner    following a corner.
Juwon Oshaniwa (Nigeria) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
